methodology: Aggregates 26 STANDARD-format tournaments held 2026-04-20 through 2026-05-17: 20 online Limitless events (≥150 players each, decklists + pairings open) plus 6 major offline events — Prague Regional (1,370p), Korean League S4 (397p), Champions League Aichi (8,000p), LA Regional (1,849p), Utrecht Regional (2,150p), Campinas Regional (1,725p). For ONLINE events: archetype assignments come from Limitless's auto-categorizer (deck.id per standing), mapped onto the project's Archetype taxonomy in src/engine/aiArchetype.ts; pairing data drives both matchupMatrix[] (Wilson-95 CIs, tie-aware win rate) and stockLists[] (inclusion / mode-count distributions). For OFFLINE events: pairings are not exposed by the Limitless tournament endpoint (decklist-visibility=open but pairings remain closed), so matchupMatrix[] and stockLists[] reflect ONLY online data. metaShare folds offline events in via a sqrt(playerCount)-weighted top-cut composition proxy: each offline event contributes sqrt(N)*20 to a synthetic sampleSize pool, distributed across its top-cut archetype breakdown. sqrt weighting was chosen to keep the 8,000-player Champions League Aichi from overwhelming the 397-player Korean League while still reflecting its higher absolute field weight (Aichi weight 1789 vs Korean 399). Unmapped offline archetypes — Dragapult variants without a Blaziken / Dudunsparce partner, N's Zoroark, Lopunny / Dudunsparce, Honchkrow / Porygon2, Hydrapple, Raging Bolt / Ogerpon, Ogerpon Box / Meganium / Wellspring variants, Greninja, Slowking, Zoroark, Dusknoir-partnered Starmie / Dragapult builds, Lucario-Mega / Hariyama, Clefairy / Ogerpon — all route to the 'unknown' bucket per the schema's Archetype | 'unknown' constraint. tournaments[].topFinishes carries the precise natural-language archetypeLabel for every offline top finish so the Field tab can surface the actual variant the pilot played. Limitations: (1) matchupMatrix cells are online-only; offline regional pairings are closed and cannot be folded in — see coverageNotes. (2) stockLists reflect only online auto-categorized decklists; offline top-cut decklists are linked per finish but not parsed into card-level inclusion stats. (3) The unknown bucket is ~57% of metaShare, largely because half-a-dozen high-share offline archetypes (Dragapult / Dusknoir, N's Zoroark, Raging Bolt / Ogerpon, Hydrapple, etc.) are not in the engine's Archetype union; Deck Doctor's grading will fall back to 'insufficient-data' when a user's hero matches one of these.

coverageNotes.detail: Online auto-categorizer (1878 player-events): n-zoroark=212, raging-bolt-ogerpon=164, other=153, rockets-honchkrow=120, okidogi-barbaracle=94, slowking-scr=83, lopunny-dudunsparce=74, starmie-dusknoir=62, greninja-ex=60, clefairy-ogerpon=58, ogerpon-box=57, stevens-metagross=52, diancie-dusknoir=44, ursaluna-lunatone=43, flareon-noctowl=41. Offline top-cut (sqrt-weighted contribution): Dragapult (no partner), N's Zoroark, Dragapult/Dusknoir, Lopunny/Dudunsparce, Lopunny-Mega/Dudunsparce, Hydrapple, Honchkrow/Porygon2, Ogerpon variants (Meganium/Wellspring/Box), Raging Bolt/Ogerpon, Greninja, Slowking, Zoroark, Mewtwo/Spidops (when distinct from rocket-mewtwo signature), Lucario-Mega/Hariyama, Starmie/Dusknoir, Clefairy/Ogerpon, Starmie-Mega/Froslass (when not matching mega-starmie-froslass signature).

LIMITLESS_API_KEY not set — used unauthenticated /tournaments, /standings, /pairings (decklist-categorization endpoint /games/PTCG/decks rejected without key, but per-tournament decklists were available).

Offline Regional + Champions League pairings are not exposed via Limitless's public endpoints — only the per-event decklist pages + top-cut standings are open. matchupMatrix[] therefore reflects pairings from the 20 online events only; offline events contribute to metaShare (via sqrt(playerCount)-weighted top-cut composition) and topFinishes only. Affected events: Prague Regional (1370p), Korean League S4 (397p), Aichi (8000p), LA Regional (1849p), Utrecht (2150p), Campinas (1725p).

Offline top-cut decklists are linked per topFinishes entry (decklistUrl on Limitless) but stockLists[] does not yet parse offline decklist HTML. inclusionRate / modeCount / averageCount in stockLists[] reflect online auto-categorized decklists only. Future refresh can fetch each linked decklistUrl to extend stockLists with offline samples for the 12 mapped archetypes.
